description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Sync ML models to Proxmox VM that triggers on push to tags model-deploy-net* and model-deploy-org*. Use a matrix strategy with two environments, robotoff-ml-net and robotoff-ml-org, each with its own set of variables. For each environment, set up SSH connections, download models using an SSH action, and run make commands to download model labels, archives, and categorizer.
